variants: Antoni Roszak currently resides in Thornwhistle Vale after being born in Sunridge Falls. He has made a name for himself through his invention, the Aurora Blade Comparator, which won him the Lucid Chronicle Prize. An active member of the Nightspire Glaziers Union, Antoni enjoys engaging with other glassmakers, sharing techniques, and encouraging creative expression within the craft. His work continues to inspire those within the glassmaking community as he contributes both as an innovator and a collaborator.
